metadata.name: Northern Iraq Kurdish Academic Journals Search
metadata.description: Starter catalog for a multilingual research search platform focused on recognised Kurdistan Region universities, institutes, and journals.
metadata.data_status: Starter dataset. Replace or extend article records with verified journal exports, OJS feeds, DOI/Crossref metadata, or manually curated records before public launch.

articles.title: Language Policy and Higher Education in the Kurdistan Region
articles.title_ku: سیاسەتی زمان و خوێندنی باڵا لە هەرێمی کوردستان
articles.title_ar: سياسة اللغة والتعليم العالي في إقليم كردستان
articles.abstract: This demonstration record studies multilingual language policy in Kurdistan Region universities, with attention to Sorani, Badini, Arabic, and English in teaching and research publication.
articles.summary: Demo result about multilingual university policy. Replace with a verified article record before launch.

articles.title: Water Resource Management in Mountain Communities of Northern Iraq
articles.title_ku: بەڕێوەبردنی سەرچاوەکانی ئاو لە ناوچە شاخاوییەکانی باکووری عێراق
articles.title_ar: إدارة الموارد المائية في المجتمعات الجبلية في شمال العراق
articles.abstract: This demonstration record covers water availability, watershed monitoring, and climate adaptation in mountainous communities around Duhok and Zakho.
articles.summary: Demo environmental science record for testing keyword search across English, Kurdish, and Arabic terms.

articles.title: Digital Transformation in Public Universities: Evidence from Erbil and Sulaimani
articles.title_ku: گۆڕانی دیجیتاڵ لە زانکۆ حکومییەکانی هەولێر و سلێمانی
articles.title_ar: التحول الرقمي في الجامعات الحكومية: أدلة من أربيل والسليمانية
articles.abstract: This demonstration record reviews digital services, e-learning infrastructure, and student information systems in public universities.
articles.summary: Demo technology and administration record for platform testing.

articles.title: Nursing Education Quality Indicators in Kurdistan Region Hospitals
articles.title_ku: نیشانەکانی کوالێتی پەروەردەی پەرستاری لە نەخۆشخانەکانی هەرێمی کوردستان
articles.title_ar: مؤشرات جودة تعليم التمريض في مستشفيات إقليم كردستان
articles.abstract: This demonstration record focuses on quality indicators in nursing education and hospital training programs in Erbil.
articles.summary: Demo health sciences result for testing medical and education searches.

articles.title: Computer Science Education and Programming Skills in Kurdistan Universities
articles.title_ku: Computer science and programming education in Kurdistan universities
articles.title_ar: تعليم علوم الحاسوب ومهارات البرمجة في جامعات كردستان
articles.abstract: This demonstration record discusses computer science curricula, software development skills, and student readiness for information technology work in Kurdistan Region universities.
articles.summary: Demo computer science result for testing searches such as computer, software, programming, IT, and AI.

articles.title: Artificial Intelligence Applications in Kurdish Academic Libraries
articles.title_ku: Artificial intelligence applications in Kurdish academic libraries
articles.title_ar: تطبيقات الذكاء الاصطناعي في المكتبات الأكاديمية الكردية
articles.abstract: This demonstration record reviews artificial intelligence, machine learning, and search tools for improving discovery in academic libraries.
articles.summary: Demo AI and digital library record for testing technology-related searches.

articles.title: Agricultural Soil Quality and Crop Production in Garmian
articles.title_ku: Agricultural soil quality and crop production in Garmian
articles.title_ar: جودة التربة الزراعية وإنتاج المحاصيل في كرميان
articles.abstract: This demonstration record studies soil quality, irrigation, and crop production in agricultural areas of Garmian.
articles.summary: Demo agriculture and environmental science result for testing farming and soil searches.

articles.title: Human Rights Law and Legal Education in the Kurdistan Region
articles.title_ku: Human rights law and legal education in the Kurdistan Region
articles.title_ar: قانون حقوق الإنسان والتعليم القانوني في إقليم كردستان
articles.abstract: This demonstration record examines legal education, human rights law, and policy development in universities in the Kurdistan Region.
articles.summary: Demo law and humanities result for testing legal and policy searches.
